scenario.title: Point-in-time recovery before an incorrect migration
scenario.description: Recover an isolated copy to a target immediately before a recorded bad migration, validate business invariants, and measure end-to-end readiness.
scenario.failureInjection: migration marker only; no production action

backup.method: physical base backup plus continuous WAL archive
verification: base backup manifest passes approved verification
required WAL chain is present through the target
backup and WAL encryption keys are accessible to recovery role

target.isolation: private recovery network with no production write endpoints

technical: PostgreSQL reaches consistent recovery target and accepts read-only checks
expected databases, schemas, extensions, roles, and constraints exist
backup recovery target and timeline evidence are recorded
business: billing totals reconcile to control values
sample customer and invoice workflows pass in read-only test mode

stopConditions: required key access violates the approved recovery path
target isolation is not in place
exercise exceeds the authorized window without extension

evidence.redactionPolicy: no credentials, literal customer data, or unredacted connection strings
